title: xanthosia peltigera
intro: Xanthosia peltigera, also known as the coastal dill or sea dill, is a perennial herb native to the coastal regions of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Xanthosia peltigera has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional remedies.
